# Omeagle

> Omeagle is a free, anonymous random video chat and text chat platform connecting users worldwide with zero registration required.

Omeagle offers instant one-click peer-to-peer WebRTC video chat, anonymous text chat with no signup, gender/country/interest-based matching, built-in AI moderation and reporting, and a fully responsive PWA for desktop, iOS, and Android.

## Docs

- [Home Page](https://omeagle.online/): Instant random video chat interface and landing page.
- [About Omeagle](https://omeagle.online/about): Overview of the mission, WebRTC architecture, and features.
- [Safety Center](https://omeagle.online/safety): Guidelines, reporting instructions, and user protection measures.
- [Blog & Guides](https://omeagle.online/blog): Guides on Omegle alternatives, video chat safety, and tips.

## Blog Articles

- [Free Random Video Chat Guide](https://omeagle.online/blog/omeagle-free-random-video-chat): How Omeagle's random video chat works.
- [Best Omegle Alternatives 2026](https://omeagle.online/blog/best-omegle-alternatives): Comparison of top Omegle alternatives.
- [Safe Video Chat Complete Guide](https://omeagle.online/blog/safe-video-chat-guide): Staying safe while video chatting with strangers.
- [OmeTV Alternative Review](https://omeagle.online/blog/ometv-alternative): How Omeagle compares to OmeTV.
- [No-Signup Video Chat Platforms](https://omeagle.online/blog/no-signup-video-chat): Platforms that don't require registration.
- [Text Chat with Strangers Tips](https://omeagle.online/blog/text-chat-with-strangers): Tips for anonymous text chat.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](https://omeagle.online/privacy): Data handling and zero-retention policy.
- [Terms of Service](https://omeagle.online/terms): Usage rules and community guidelines.
